zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella MacDuff於1320年出生在蘇格蘭費伏時，她的父親Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife31歲，母親Mary de Monthermer23歲。她於大約1340年與Sir William de Felton結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1389年8月12日在蘇格蘭阿吉爾享年69歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella MacDuff于1320年出生在苏格兰費伏时，她的父亲Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife31岁，母亲Mary de Monthermer23岁。她于大约1340年与Sir William de Felton结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1389年8月12日在苏格兰阿吉爾享年69岁，埋葬在苏格兰斯林史爾斯特林。

nameMeanings.name: MacDuff
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDuff
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Duibh, a patronymic from the personal name or byname Dubh ‘black, dark-haired, swarthy’. Compare Duff .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella MacDuff was born in 1320, in Fife, Scotland, her father, Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife, was 31 and her mother, Mary de Monthermer, was 23. She married Sir William de Felton about 1340. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 12 August 1389, in Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 69, and was buried in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella MacDuff est née en 1320, à Fife, Écosse, son père, Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mary de Monthermer, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William de Felton environ 1340. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 12 août 1389, à Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Stirling, Stirlingshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella MacDuff 1320 in Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife 31 und ihre Mutter Mary de Monthermer 23. Sie hat um 1340 Sir William de Felton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 12. August 1389 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella MacDuff è nata il nel 1320 nel Fife, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Mary de Monthermer, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir William de Felton circa 1340. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 agosto 1389, nel Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella MacDuffが1320年にスコットランドフィフで生まれた時，父Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fifeは31歳，母Mary de Monthermerは23歳であった。約1340年にSir William de Feltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1389年8月12日にスコットランドアルグイルで69歳で死去し，スコットランドスティルリングシュアイアスティルリングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella MacDuff(이)가 1320년 스컷랜드 피프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary de Monthermer(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1340년 Sir William de Felton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1389년 8월 12일 스컷랜드 아그이에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 스티를링에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella MacDuff nasceu em 1320, em Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Monthermer, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William de Felton aproximadamente 1340. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 12 de agosto de 1389, em Argyll, Scotland, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella MacDuff родилась в 1320 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mary de Monthermer, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William de Felton около 1340 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 12 августа 1389 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности стирлинг, стирлингшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella MacDuff nació en 1320, en Fife, Scotland, su papá, Sir Donnchadh MacDuff Earl of Fife, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mary de Monthermer, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir William de Felton aproximadamente 1340. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de agosto de 1389, en Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Stirling, Stirlingshire, Scotland.
